message:
feat(interpreters): comprehensive PE/staging tests with structured logging (bd-3dl.14.5)

Add 49 new tests (67 total) for partial evaluation and staging with all 7
required test categories: constant folding, full residual, mixed known/unknown,
staging pipeline equivalence, JIT integration, edge cases, and property tests.
All tests emit structured JSON logs to artifacts/testing/logs/fj-interpreters/.

Fix PE residual variable remapping bug: unknown Jaxpr equations referenced
renamed residual VarIds that were never bound. Tests caught MissingVariable
errors on staging roundtrip. Fix: keep original VarIds instead of renaming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
